EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The audit daemon configuration file "{object.fullpath}" was changed on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} changed audit daemon configuration files on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} changed the audit daemon configuration file "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
Audit daemon configuration files were changed on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} changed audit daemon configuration files on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} changed the audit daemon configuration file "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
